scripts.docker:run: docker run -d --name beap-relay -p 51249:51249 -e RELAY_AUTH_SECRET=test-secret -v beap-relay-data:/data wrdesk/beap-relay:latest
scripts.docker:stop: docker stop beap-relay 2>/dev/null; docker rm beap-relay 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.docker:push: echo 'Push to your registry: docker push wrdesk/beap-relay:latest'
